message:
Add 68 CNCF project entries to marketplace registry (#1)

Add 11 available card presets for CNCF projects that already have card
implementations (Kubernetes, Helm, Argo, Prometheus, OPA, Falco,
cert-manager, Istio, Kyverno, Kubescape, OpenCost) and 57 help-wanted
skeleton entries for remaining CNCF graduated/incubating projects.

Each entry includes CNCF project metadata (maturity, category, website),
difficulty rating, and required skills to attract community contributors.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
